{{CargoOrgan
|name=Amaterasu Plume
|type=Bionic
|rank=purple
|id=10672
|idx=29
|description=In the name of faith, it ignites an eternal flame. These tail feathers, woven of Amaterasu’s fire, shall rise reborn from ashes!
|skill=On combat start, summon 4 fire feathers to attack the enemy, each feather dealing DMG equal to 15.7% of ATK!
|hp=1646
|def=126
|atk=100
|rush=241
|gene1=In Angel Form, Fire RES +120
|gene2=In Angel Form, {race} HP +600
|gene3=In Angel Form, {race} RUSH +60
|gene4=In Angel Form, HP Regen effect +12%
|gene7=In Angel Form, HP Regen effect +12% (Awakened)
|}}
